prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny bugfix workflow without waiting for more user input. Use @bug to find and fix the zero-division handling so divide() raises ValueError("division by zero"), use @t to make sure pytest coverage and verification are in place, use @cr for the review pass, update README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, bugbuster, tester, and reviewer roles
divide() raises ValueError on zero division
Tests were added or updated and pytest -q passed
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
